import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/types";

export const cobalt2Theme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#0088ff",
    focusColor: "#2affdf",
    style: "rounded",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#2affdf",
    accentForeground: "#193549",
    background: "#193549",
    border: "#0088ff",
    error: "#ff0088",
    errorForeground: "#193549",
    focusRing: "#2affdf",
    foreground: "#ffffff",
    info: "#ff9d00",
    infoForeground: "#193549",
    muted: "#0d1b2a",
    mutedForeground: "#adb7c9",
    primary: "#0088ff",
    primaryForeground: "#193549",
    secondary: "#284156",
    secondaryForeground: "#ffffff",
    selection: "#0088ff",
    selectionForeground: "#193549",
    success: "#9eff80",
    successForeground: "#193549",
    warning: "#ffc600",
    warningForeground: "#193549",
  },
  name: "cobalt2",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
